corrections.note: Printed body reads συμπορεύσεται with mu, not nu.

corrections.location: ℵ variant, end of first line of apparatus
corrections.current: καὶ ἐξῆλθεν πορευόμεναι τὴν ὁδὸν αὐτοῦ
corrections.correct: καὶ ἐξῆλθεν πορευόμενος τὴν ὁδὸν αὐτοῦ
corrections.note: Masculine participle in the apparatus is πορευόμενος, not πορευόμεναι.
Apparatus text reads ἔτυχεν, not ἤνυσε.
Printed apparatus reads περιψῦξαι, not περιχλῦσαι.
The lemma in the apparatus is ἀναπήδησας, matching the apparatus text, not ἀνεπήδησεν.

notes: Running head matches. Body is otherwise correct; marginal line indicators in the body transcription are acceptable as verse numbers where printed inline. Apparatus mostly correct, but several readings were miscopied.
